narrative.zh: 花园里开满了花！小熊发现蝴蝶的翅膀是对称的——帮它画出另一半翅膀！
narrative.en: The garden is full of flowers! Bear noticed butterfly wings are symmetrical — draw the other half!

narrative.zh: 向日葵的种子排列有神秘的规律！1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8... 这是什么数列？
narrative.en: Sunflower seeds have a mysterious pattern! 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8... What sequence is this?

narrative.zh: 雪花落在花园里！每一片雪花都是完美对称的——来画一片吧！
narrative.en: Snow falls in the garden! Every snowflake is perfectly symmetrical — draw one!
